creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #3)

Ah ha, well, if that's what the issue is, I can fix that by just using libinput for the mouse/touchpad and then reinstall xf86-input-keyboard and use kbdmux for the keyboard driver.  Thanks for the pointer!

And I am running Mate, so don't think wayland plays nice with that.
